name: Rising Dragon Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: Rising Dragon Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Each unit consists of one Class A ordinary share and one right to receive one-tenth (1/10) of one share of Class A ordinary share upon consummation of an initial business combination. The company is headquartered in Hong Kong.
